title: astragalus polystachys
intro: Astragalus polystachys, also known as milk vetch, is a type of perennial herb in the legume family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus polystachys include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Astragalus polystachys is often prepared as a decoction or extract for use in herbal remedies, and is also available in capsule or tea form.
